# Expected files after /obsidian-export runs
#
# /obsidian-export is a local-export-write skill — it generates a DERIVED,
# regenerable Obsidian knowledge layer from canonical idea-to-deploy artifacts.
#
# Produces (under the generated-output dir):
#   .itd-integrations/obsidian/PROJECT_INDEX.md     (entrypoint)
#   .itd-integrations/obsidian/KNOWLEDGE_GRAPH.md
#   .itd-integrations/obsidian/STATE.md
#   .itd-integrations/obsidian/DECISIONS.md
#   .itd-integrations/obsidian/GATES.md
#   .itd-integrations/obsidian/<copied planning + memory notes>
#
# /obsidian-export MUST NOT:
#   - Modify canonical source docs (LAUNCH_PLAN.md, BACKLOG.md, STATE.json, etc.)
#     — canonical edits go in source, then the export is regenerated
#   - Make Obsidian syntax mandatory for canonical idea-to-deploy docs
#   - Sync secrets / credentials / private customer data / production dumps
#   - Write outside the project to a real vault without asking first
#
# /obsidian-export MAY:
#   - Read canonical artifacts + memory dir
#   - Generate the vault-ready note set under .itd-integrations/obsidian/
#   - Use [[wikilinks]], ![[embeds]], callouts, itd/* frontmatter tags
#   - Print the output shape (OBSIDIAN EXPORT / ENTRYPOINT / NOTES /
#     SOURCE ARTIFACTS / REGENERATE COMMAND / NEXT ACTION)
#
# Validation deferred (status: pending) — same bucket as fixture-15-advisor
# (generated output + stdout). Manual verification via notes.md.
